body:
⛩️🇯🇵Esploriamo il tempio Daishō-in, un luogo nascosto di spiritualità sul Monte Misen.
Le statue giapponesi che popolano questo sito sacro hanno volti unici, ognuna con una espressione diversa.
Giappone, spiritualità, tradizione e bellezza si mescolano in questo angolo di pace, dove ogni statua racconta una storia silenziosa.

Un'esperienza unica che ti fa riflettere sul significato profondo del buddhismo giapponese e della spiritualità orientale.

Chi ha mai visto una statua così? 
📍Curioso di sapere dove si trova questo posto? Commenta sotto e ti dirò le coordinate precise!
------------
A hidden gem at Daishō-in Temple, a spiritual place at the foot of Mount Misen.
The Japanese statues that adorn this sacred site have unique faces, each with a different expression.
Japan, spirituality, tradition, and beauty blend together in this peaceful corner, where each statue tells a silent story.

A unique experience that makes you reflect on the deep meaning of Japanese Buddhism and Eastern spirituality.
Have you ever seen a statue like this? ✨
Curious to know where this place is? Comment below and I'll tell you the exact coordinates!

#Salva questo posto per il tuo prossimo viaggio in Giappone!
#SaveThisSpot for your next Japan trip!

#Daishoin #MiyajimaIsland #HiddenJapan #JapanReels #SpiritualJapan #JapanVibes #TempliGiapponesi #StatueGiapponesi #MonteMisen #Giappone #ExploreJapan #TravelReels #SpiritualJourney #JapanCulture #ViaggioInGiappone #WondersOfJapan #JapanBucketList #GiapponeMagico #TravelJapan #DiscoverJapan #viaggiingiappone

body:
Si vous voyagez au Japon, ne passez pas à côté de l’île de Miyajima, proche d’Hiroshima.⛩️

On y découvre l’un des symboles du pays : le torii flottant du sanctuaire d’Itsukushima, dressé sur la mer depuis plus de 800 ans et classé à l’UNESCO.

Mais l’île ne s’arrête pas à cette image iconique. 
En montant vers le mont Misen, on croise des daims en liberté et des forêts paisibles avant d’atteindre le temple bouddhiste Daishō-in, fondé au IXe siècle par le grand moine Kūkai. 
Ses statues, ses salles de prières et ses escaliers bordés de sutras en font l’un des temples les plus impressionnants du Japon.

Pour moi, Miyajima est une étape incontournable d’un voyage au Japon.

Abonnez-vous pour découvrir avec moi les autres trésors cachés du Japon 🇯🇵 

#japan #visitjapan #japantravel #explorejapan #travel #miyajima #itsukushima #toriigate #wanderlustjapan #naturelovers #japaneseculture #buddhisttemple #hiddenjapan

body: On her daughter Lizzy’s birthday, Eleanor receives a video call from Lizzy, revealing she’s been locked alone in a car under the scorching sun, on the verge of death. Meanwhile, her husband Mason is at an amusement park with Selene, the widow of his late best friend, and her daughter Dolly. As Eleanor desperately searches for her daughter, she faces deception and suppression from those around her. Emotionally shattered, Eleanor gets help from Benjamin, a surgeon and her former junior schoolmate. They find Lizzy trapped in Selene’s car, suffering from heatstroke and unconscious—but it’s too late. Lizzy tragically dies. After reading Lizzy’s diary, Eleanor resolves to divorce Mason, ending a marriage filled with deceit and indifference.

body: On her daughter Lizzy’s birthday, Eleanor receives a video call from Lizzy, revealing she’s been locked alone in a car under the scorching sun, on the verge of death. Meanwhile, her husband Mason is at an amusement park with Selene, the widow of his late best friend, and her daughter Dolly. As Eleanor desperately searches for her daughter, she faces deception and suppression from those around her. Emotionally shattered, Eleanor gets help from Benjamin, a surgeon and her former junior schoolmate. They find Lizzy trapped in Selene’s car, suffering from heatstroke and unconscious—but it’s too late. Lizzy tragically dies. After reading Lizzy’s diary, Eleanor resolves to divorce Mason, ending a marriage filled with deceit and indifference.
